text: A district may accept grants and loans from the United States, this state and its agencies and political subdivisions, and other persons and entities.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 174. Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 174.253 — Grants and Loans

A district may accept grants and loans from the United States, this state and its agencies and political subdivisions, and other persons and entities.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A district may accept grants and loans from the United States, this state and its agencies and political subdivisions, and other persons and entities.
